title: Repurposed Structures - Drunken Mug Compat
description: Spawn some pubs in RS villages and drink responsibly!
body:
Add this datapack to the game to make Repurposed Structures's overworld villages have pubs from Drunken Mug mod! Just be sure to not get drunk and no bar fights allowed! The pubs are fairly common to find but no RS village will ever spawn more than 1 pub in a single village


- Drunken Mug mod can be obtained from here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/drunken-mug

- Repurposed Structures mod can be obtained from here: https://modrinth.com/mod/repurposed-structures-forge


![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Wb04AnC7/images/2f792c6f14d91f0d828734771dc189ced9791018.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Wb04AnC7/images/2f792c6f14d91f0d828734771dc189ced9791018.png)


**Note:** for people using CurseForge Launcher to download datapacks, use mods like Global Data & Resourcespacks to automatically load in downloaded datapacks without needing to manually move the datapacks from the resourcepack folder to the correct folders. 
https://modrinth.com/mod/globalpacks
